programme.desc: Polka band leader Jan Lewan rips off his adoring fans with false promises of sizable investment returns.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Idaho Guardsman Darryl Wright claims he suffers from post-traumatic stress disorder from his service in Iraq, but his story is an elaborate scam that allows him to live large without working and to steal resources from veterans who truly need help.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: By promising enormous returns on a work-from-home scheme selling TelexFree phone service, Carlos Wanzeler and James Merrrill entice nearly one million people in an extraordinary $1.7 billion internet scam.

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: An unexpected transfer student, Hayato Gokudera, arrives in Tsuna's class, and for some reason, Gokudera hates Tsuna right from the beginning.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Two strangers arrive searching for Tsuna's house. Tsuna has become friends with Yamamoto and Gokudera, who is actually a member of the Vongola family.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Haru has been watching Reborn ever since she fell in love with him at first sight. She gets the impression that Tsuna is a bad influence on him.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: The Disciplinary Commitee has immense power in Namimoi Middle School. Kyoya is the leader of the delinquents, and attacks anyone who is weak.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Tsuna is saved from a dog by I-Pin, a small child wearing Chinese clothes. I-Pin uses techniques which can only be described as psychic powers.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Tsuna goes to school in deathperation mode. When he returns to normal, he notices that he was dragging someone. The boy turns out to be Ryohei.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Tsuna returns home to find a bunch of frightening faces waiting for him. Tsuna rushes to his room to find a young man sitting. The man is Dino.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Tsuna suddenly becomes dizzy and a skull mark appears on his hand. According to Reborn, it is the symptom of an incurable illness known as Skullitis.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Tsuna forgets his lunch and Lambo ends up taking it to him. When Lambo bumps into I-Pin, a mix-up of packages results in a riot at school!

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Coaxed by Reborn, Tsuna blurts out that he's going to tell Kyoko that he loves her.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Nana tells Gokudera to take care of Tsuna. But when he is unable to protect Tsuna from bees, Gokudera is embarrassed.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Reborn declares that the customary Vongola New Year Inter-family Battle will be held with Dino’s Chiavarone Family as their opponents!

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Reborn has set up Tsuna on a date with Kyoko. Tsuna is thrilled, but when Tsuna meets Kyoko, he can’t seem to avoid running into people he knows.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Reborn has plotted another competition, as a snowball fight begins. What started as winter fun has turned into a battle for survival!

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Reborn appears to tell Tsuna that the place they're visiting is built exactly like Death Mountain, a secret Vongola training ground!

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Tsuna is hospitalized because of his injuries from Death Mountain, but his peaceful recovery is continually interrupted by his noisy friends.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day and Tsuna is curious to see who Kyoko will give chocolate to.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Futa, who is being chased by Mafioso, stumbles across Tsuna. Futa is an informant and you can control the world if you get hold of his ranking book.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: A sudden series of attacks have targeted Namimori Middle School's prefects. According to Ryohei, Kokuyo Middle School students are behind the attacks.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Reborn has discovered the perpetrators behind the attacks on Namimori Middle School are not ordinary students, but people involved with the mafia.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Yamamoto wins in battle against Ken Joshima, but Tsuna regrets the fact that he was a burden. Now Bianchi must contend against the girl named M. M.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Gokudera and the others have been separated from Tsuna, and the main perpetrator of the attacks, Mukuro Rokudo, appears before them.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Tsuna has defeated Mukuro—or has he? It turns out that Mukuro is really Lancia, one of Mukuro’s associates.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's day three for Thomas Plant and Mark Hales as they battle for the biggest profit. Beginning in Ironbridge, Shropshire, they head to Froncysyllte in North Wales for the auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and Mark Hales battle it out as they start the day in Newport Pembrokeshire and end up at auction showdown Llandeilo in Carmarthenshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the last day for Thomas Plant and Mark Hales. They begin in Hay-on-Wye and it's all down to the deciding auction in Pontrilas in Herefordshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a fresh route for a new set of experts: Phil Serrell and Jonathan Pratt. Their first stop is Cockermouth in the Lake District, ending up in Kirkby Lonsdale for auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell and Jonathan Pratt continue their hunt for bargains starting in Corbridge and ending up with an auction showdown in Northallerton.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell has taken the lead as Jonathan Pratt struggles to find his form with antiques! They start day three in Darlington in the Tees valley and end up at auction in Doncaster.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phillip Serrell has taken a commanding lead but Jonathan Pratt is determined to catch him up as they go into day four of their trip. Today they start buying in Gainsborough and end up in Lincoln for the auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Jonathan Pratt's last day to claw back some profit to try and catch the mighty Phil Serrell as they motor from Sheffield to auction in Wilmslow.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and James Lewis take to the road as they go head-to-head to try and make the most profit from buying and selling antiques. They start their journey in Pateley Bridge, Yorkshire, and end up at the auction in Grimsby.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and James Lewis continue to battle it out, starting in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, and ending up at an auction showdown in Diss, Norfolk.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning is close on the heels of James Lewis as they battle it out to become king or queen of antiques profits. Winding through the English countryside, they start in Fakenham ending up with an auction in Aylsham.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Lewis has nudged ahead in the antique profit stakes but Anita Manning is fighting back hard. It's still all to play for as they start the day's journey in Needham Market, Suffolk, and end with an exciting auction in Bedford.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the last day for Anita Manning to snatch the lead from James Lewis as they start in Woburn in Bedfordshire and end up at a gripping auction in Cirencester, Gloucestershire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the first day for Charlie Ross and James Braxton to take to the road, and what a day it is! Their adventures start in the Highlands of Scotland in a small town called Cromarty and end in Buckie at a record-breaking auction showdown.

programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head for the races as they arrive at Chepstow Racecourse.

programme.desc: A second visit for Fiona Bruce and the experts at Stowe School in Buckinghamshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts return to the Scarborough Spa Pavilion for another busy day.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc creates four mouth-watering chocolate recipes: a simple mousse, rich chocolate delice, fondant with a melting middle, and his signature dessert: cafe creme, which is a chocolate-sculpted cup filled with a mousse and coffee sabayon.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond dives into the world of fish with the underused and affordable mackerel; he creates a light meal of grilled mackerel with a soy lime dressing.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc looks to the UK's favorite fruit, apples, for inspiration; he returns to memories of childhood with a simple tart made with a foolproof pastry and custard filling.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc celebrates the season with a winter vegetable salad featuring beetroots, a celeriac puree served with a crisp-skinned roast wild duck with blackberry sauce and watercress soup.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc uses two seasonal ingredients, game and mushrooms, to create a French version of a pasty called pithivier, which is filled with a rich mix of pheasant, chestnuts and dried fruits; he also makes a cep mushroom tortellini with fresh pasta.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: The miracle of yeast helps Raymond to create a French classic: brioche; he gets down to basics with a French country bread recipe that's essential for any baker to add to their repertoire; lastly, he makes a spectacular apple croustade.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc combines the universally popular ingredients of egg and cheese to make a classic omelette with a secret technique; he then uses a Comte from his home region in France to make a family-style souffle.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc focuses on tomatoes, opening with a simple salad recipe inspired by his mother; he also makes a creamy risotto, stuffed tomatoes glazed with cheese and a series of ices and sorbets to cleanse the palate with elegance.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc celebrates the best of British shellfish as he cooks dishes including Moules Mariniere, seared squid salad and Scottish lobster.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond begins with a feather-light lemon tea cake, coated in an apricot jam and tangy lemon glaze; he also makes a choux pastry filled with chocolate cream and covered with a chocolate icing; lastly, the secrets to the perfect macarons.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc shares his favorite lamb dishes: lamb liver with caramelized potatoes and French seasoning, a slow-roasted garlic and herb lamb shoulder with potato and turnip gratin and lamb provencal with ratatouille.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond celebrates his passion for puddings, cooking dishes including riz au lait, tarte tatin and fruit crumble.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond shares his love of charcuterie, beginning with thin slices of duck cured in herbs and juniper berries; also, he makes a chicken liver parfait and a meaty pot-au-feu medley; lastly, a ham hock terrine served with home-made pickles.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Drawing upon his travels through Asia, Raymond creates dishes full of fragrant spice and fiery heat.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond demonstrates the versatility of the summer's juiciest fruits with a simple but impressive berry-strewn pavlova and a spicy cherry clafloutis sees the vibrant fruit cushioned in a bed of soft, sumptuous pastry.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets

programme.desc: Wedding bells are ringing for Doc and Louisa. But will the marriage finally go ahead?

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: It is Louisa's first day back at school, and their new child minder Mel is late for work. When Mel finally does arrive, Martin is dubious about handing James over.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: A stranger stops dead in his tracks when he sees Ruth in the village, and later he spies on her when she is having a coffee with Caroline. Ruth is not sure why, but she starts feeling uneasy.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa wants Martin to engage more with James, so she arranges for him to take their baby to playgroup. There, he must pair up with a mother and daughter and sing songs.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Mrs. Tishell returns to the village. Martin has to work out what is wrong with beachcomber Lorna. Al and Morwenna have an internet dating disaster, and romance is blossoming for Bert and Jennifer.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Hypochondriac Malcolm Rayner is struggling with his breathing and Martin asks him if he has ever worked with asbestos.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Al receives a visit from two military policemen who are trying to track down Baby James's babysitter, Mike Pruddy.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa is leaving for Spain. Bert and Jennifer's engagement party goes off with a bang. Al is hailed as a hero for saving Caroline's life.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Former surgeon Dr Martin Ellingham arrives in the sleepy Cornish hamlet of Portwenn, replacing the former GP who has died.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin's surgery officially opens for business, but patients continue to treat it as a drop-in cafe.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: When an epidemic of diarrhea strikes the village, the doctor takes immediate action. This, however, does not go down well with the population.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Mrs. Tishell decides she can no longer hide her love for Martin and, fueled by a cocktail of drugs, takes drastic action.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Wedding bells are ringing for Doc and Louisa. But will the marriage finally go ahead?

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Músculo
programme.desc: Jamie es cuestionado por la muerte de un pandillero que perseguía. Baez se infiltra para investigar al prometido de la ex de Danny, quien vende drogas desde su gimnasio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuestas mortales
programme.desc: Un oficial es acusado de usar fuerza excesiva, lo que pone al departamento bajo escrutinio. Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un corredor de valores endeudado.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC regresa a sus orígenes cuando miran uno de los viejos casos de Rossi y Gideon para localizar a un asesino que se escapó.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una cafetería explota en Indianápolis y un héroe emerge de los escombros, la UAC trata de proteger a esa persona y a su familia mientras buscan al sospechoso antes de que ocurran más incidentes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Las víctimas en California hacen que la UAC busque a un sospechoso que puede haber sido testigo de abuso cuando era niño.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando dos guardias de una prisión privada de máxima seguridad en Texas son asesinados, la UAC presiente que más de un sospechoso dentro de la prisión podría estar involucrado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS entra en acción para encontrar al agresor responsable de matar a golpes a un marine en su propio patio.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS se somete a evaluaciones psicológicas obligatorias mientras investiga la muerte de un comandante naval.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que un terrorista suicida intente asesinar al ministro de Defensa de Belgravia, el equipo debe proteger a su hija, que está estudiando en Estados Unidos; Gibbs investiga la muerte de un marine que falleció en el atentado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Las yemas de los dedos y los dientes desmembrados de un marine asesinado se descubren en el bolso robado a un carterista, lo que lanza al NCIS a la misión de encontrar a un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuestas mortales
programme.desc: Un oficial es acusado de usar fuerza excesiva, lo que pone al departamento bajo escrutinio. Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un corredor de valores endeudado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Se hace justicia
programme.desc: Después de la cena de Frank con el abogado mafioso Angelo Gallo, este es tiroteado y Frank escapa por poco. Mientras, Danny es llamado para servir en un jurado y termina siendo la única opinión disidente en un juicio por asesinato.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Mala sangre
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan un homicidio con el hermano de Baez como sospechoso. Frank se entera de que un oficial canino condecorado es acusado de brutalidad policial.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Error de identidad
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan un atentado local, pero enfrentan tensión y resistencia de la comunidad. Mientras, Frank debe lidiar con las consecuencias políticas cuando un hombre golpea a un oficial que fue demasiado agresivo en su interrogatorio.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 6/5/2016. The famed Carnival celebration sets the tone for Anthony Bourdain’s visit to this city that boasts Kolsch, the raw minced pork dish mett and blood sausage.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 6/12/2016. Anthony Bourdain’s trip to this city renowned for its love of meat features a meal at the famed Don Carlos and an after-hours soccer match.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/20/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits the Johannesburg Suburb of Hillbrow, where he spends a day with a taxi driver while absorbing the culture and of course, food.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 3/26/2023. Mexico City is one of the world’s emerging food destinations, and it’s also Eva Longoria’s second home. Longoria takes us to some of her favorite eating spots, but in this constantly evolving city, there is always more to explore.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 3/26/2023. Mexico City is one of the world’s emerging food destinations, and it’s also Eva Longoria’s second home. Longoria takes us to some of her favorite eating spots, but in this constantly evolving city, there is always more to explore.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/2/2023. In the jungles of Yucatán State, on the eastern edge of Mexico, Longoria explores the home of the ancient Maya, where a fierce pride in that ancestry still permeates every custom and dish, even in the most innovative kitchens.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/9/2023. Travelling to the mountains of Southern Mexico, Longoria discovers the hidden magic of Oaxaca that boasts some of the finest ingredients in Mexico, including chocolate, corn, tomatoes and the much-loved quesillo cheese.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/16/2023. Eva Longoria visits the northeastern state of Nuevo Leon, bordering her home state of Texas. As little grows there, and with meat on every menu, inventive and resourceful chefs transform simple ingredients into culinary delights.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/23/2023. Eva Longoria visits the state of Jalisco, where much of what is seen is quintessentially ‘Mexican’ originated. She also discovers that the state capital, Guadalajara, boasts some of the country’s most cutting-edge restaurants.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/30/2023. Eva Longoria explores the port gateway between Mexico and the rest of the world, Veracruz, and discovers that in its people remains a defiant spirit, still evident in their character, music, and the bold flavors of their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 4/24/2016. Anthony Bourdain explores the Philippines at Christmas and eats at beloved chicken chain Jollibee, samples sisig and indulges in the popular dessert halo-halo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/1/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the iconic Old Town Ale House, eats mapo tofu in Chinatown and shares a home-cooked meal with rapper Lupe Fiasco.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/8/2016. On the island of Naxos, Anthony Bourdain dives to a sunken shipwreck, drinks raki with locals and samples cuisine fresh off a fishing boat.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/15/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the Crow Reservation, hunts with podcast host Joe Rogan and eats dinner at Butte institution Lydia’s Supper Club.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Koreatown in Los Angeles, where he finds a tight-knit community marked by the 1992 Rodney King riots.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/28/2013. Colombia has changed immensely over the past 10 years. Anthony Bourdain explores several regions of the country, from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/14/2021. Stanley Tucci feasts on pizza in Naples. Stanley embarks on a whirlwind tour to find the freshest mozzarella and the best San Marzano tomatoes, and enjoys a spectacular spaghetti and zucchini.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A hit and run call results in the intoxicated suspect being coaxed out of his car at gun-point. Officers respond to a stabbing and the victim is rushed to the hospital by paramedics. Officers give a tour of a newly renovated jail in Maricopa County, AZ.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect is incensed about being detained, a woman calls police regarding a naked man on her porch, and an eight-year-old girl deprived of social media throws a tantrum.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Detectives stop a vehicle leaving a known drug house and find a loaded concealed gun while searching one of the passengers. Local residents complain about a loud neighbor. A man is spotted walking down a road with a saw.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to jump out of a car when his friend takes him on a high-speed chase, and a deputy investigates a man he finds walking down a dark road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car pursuit turned foot chase ends with the suspect jumping head first into a creek-bed. Officers catch up to a man trying to flee the scene after assaulting his wife. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle driving with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who’s struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun. A masked-up cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A daring driver takes officers on a wild ride, a man offers a bizarre excuse for the items found in his car, and a man is arrested after threatening his neighbor with a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female assailant attacks a woman after merely bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on an unsuspecting cameraman’s expensive equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist runs a red light then runs from police, deputies arrest an uncooperative domestic violence suspect, and a low-speed chase ends in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Multiple units pursue a stolen vehicle on the run. A woman tells officers her intoxicated boyfriend destroyed her mailbox then fled. A loaded shotgun is found in a vehicle after a brief pursuit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man who claims he’s merely returning a bicycle to its owner is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist leads officers on a high-speed chase, a dead car battery won't stop a man from eluding the police, and a wanted driver fails to avoid an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police are led on a lengthy chase, a man is pulled over in a new car he doesn't own, and a detained woman has choice words about her boyfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck — the owner says otherwise. A couple stops a woman from driving away in their car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist tries to escape on foot, a couple's synthetic marijuana use catches up with them, and an officer tries to get the real story behind a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver leaves her car during a routine traffic stop, officers stop a car that appears to have fake tags, and police respond to an altercation between a father and son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wearing women’s underwear exposes himself. While on patrol officers question a naked man in the backseat of a vehicle who explains to officers that he’s camping. It takes several officers to take down a deranged naked man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman tells officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are left to solve the crime after signs of an apparent stabbing. A man loiters in a private park. A driver insists that the car is his - even though he needs a screwdriver to start the ignition and the plates are stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspect running down the street with a knife, the driver of a stolen car takes off on foot after he's pulled over, and police find carjacked vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop, an Officer recognizes the passengers from a prior drug related arrest. A K-9 unit assists in the pursuit of a grand theft auto suspect who flees on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer on street patrol chases down a suspect on foot, an alleged car thief posts his exploits on Facebook, and a crashed stolen car may not have been stolen after all.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an individual with a saw-like knife. A man accused of auto theft claims his girlfriend allowed him to borrow her wheels. Chiquita the chihuahua helps its owner through hard times.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team delves into the kinky world of "rubber dolls" when they investigate the murder of a man stabbed in an alley.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a murder at Clark County jail after an inmate stumbles upon a body while running away from officers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the bizarre death of a man who was killed not once, but twice. Sharon Osbourne guest stars as Elise Massey, the manager of a billiards championship.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI's investigation of the victim of an apparent hit-and-run leads them into the world of aeronautics.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team reopens a 10-year-old murder/suicide case when the sole survivor claims her accused father was innocent.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team learns the main suspect in the gig harbor killings is being released from jail due to lack of evidence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a homicide at a convention for people who collect macabre murder memorabilia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a young victim dressed as a superhero.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a death involving a vintage Rolls Royce and a chrome-covered victim.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a murder with ties to two teenaged kidnapped girls.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI unit faces the final showdown with the Gig Harbor killer whose motives are finally revealed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara's fate remains in question as the CSI team rushes to find out if she survived an attack by the miniature killer, on the eighth season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates two unusual cases, one involving the suspicious death of a go-cart racer who took his hobby to the highway and paid the price with his life, and a murder at a hip new restaurant where patrons dine in the dark.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of an entire family, except for one daughter, who supposedly is possessed by the devil.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En un accidente aéreo muy cercano a la franja de Las Vegas mueren cinco personas y el equipo de CSI acude para investigar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una destacada presentadora de noticias durante una transmisión en vivo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe resolver el caso que involucra a una estrella del tenis en ascenso. Los CSI se quedan sorprendidos al escuchar que Hodges está comprometido con una belleza italiana.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el CSI de Nueva York, Mac Taylor, decide sorprender a su novia en Las Vegas, descubre que ella está desaparecida y le pide a su amigo D.B. Russell su ayuda. Estrella invitada Gary Sinise de CSI:NY.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de la hermana de un famoso cantante cubano que se encuentra en la ciudad como parte de una gira por Estados Unidos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara es la principal sospechosa en una investigación después de un breve encuentro con un hombre y ella fue la última persona en verlo con vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando varios jugadores prominentes de póquer pierden la vida, se llama al equipo de CSI para investigar antes de que surjan más víctimas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo se une a David Phillips en su reunión de la escuela secundaria cuando descubre que la reina del baile ha sido asesinada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI encuentra un cuerpo cerca de una reserva forestal, descubren lo que podría ser un asesino en serie y su extraña guarida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando los CSI investigan un triple homicidio, Russell tiene que encontrar la manera de conectarse con una niña de 6 años que fue la única sobreviviente y testigo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un retiro espiritual popular cuando se encuentra un cuerpo flotando en un baño de barro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un cazador de fantasmas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras Russell y su equipo investigan una serie de asesinatos, uno de los suyos se enfrenta al peligro en una arriesgada misión encubierta para acercarse al asesino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se apresura a encontrar a Morgan y a Ellie Brass después de su secuestro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio Caine's son Kyle returns from the war, he seeks the help of his father and the CSI team to solve a disturbing murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Spring Break raises the body count in Miami when Horatio Caine and the CSI team splits up to solve three different murders.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A victim's spirit won't leave Calleigh alone until she finds justice for his murder. She must enlist the help of Horatio and the rest of the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A seemingly perfect jewelry heist ends in murder and when crime scene evidence is stolen from the lab, and Delko returns to find the culprit.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a suburban soccer mom is murdered, the CSIs uncover her family's dark past, while Delko continues his undercover mission.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio Caine's ex-girlfriend is killed in an explosion, the team looks within their own department to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts the CSIs by leaving them cryptic hints, and the longer it takes them to decode these puzzles, the higher the death toll rises.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team suffers the tragic loss of one of their own when a psychotic genius runs wild in otherwise beautiful Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a bottle girl is murdered at an exclusive club, Horatio must search through Miami's most elite guest list to find her killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young girl is kidnapped and the CSIs' only witness is a blind man, who heard the abduction, leading Horatio to an old nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the killer of Horatio's wife busts out of prison and goes on a rampage, they must determine what he's after and find him before he strikes again.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a reality star is murdered, the CSIs investigate the cast, the obsessed fans, and the stars' hidden pasts to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man claims to have dreamed of a murder before it happened, Horatio must send Natalia undercover for the team to determine the truth.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a sugar refinery explodes, Horatio Caine and the CSI team make a shocking discovery about one of the factory's employees.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI trabaja contrarreloj para encontrar al supuesto cómplice en un caso de asesinato con hacha de hace años antes de que se ejecute al asesino convicto.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI corre contra el tiempo para localizar y desactivar una bomba radiactiva que estallará en medio del centro de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI se enfrentan a la infame y mortal pandilla Mala Noche de Miami después de que un funeral se convierte en el escenario de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un accidente de navegación familiar revela un siniestro complot de estafadores para robar diez millones de dólares en lingotes de oro. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de una adolescente que estaba de fiesta en Miami de camino a las Bahamas con su clase de secundaria.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un joven enfrenta cadena perpetua, y posiblemente algo peor, a menos que Horatio pueda probar su inocencia contra adversidades insuperables.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo corren contra el tiempo para descubrir quién está tratando de incriminar a Horatio por el asesinato de una mujer con la que ha estado saliendo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un fin de semana de esposas termina en asesinato, el equipo de CSI se enfrenta a tres mujeres cuyas citas separadas con la víctima las convierten en las principales sospechosas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo trabaja en conjunto con el jefe de CSI de Nueva York, Mac Taylor, para arrestar a un asesino en serie antes de que mate a la joven que acaba de tomar como rehén.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ryan Wolfe es atacado y gravemente herido mientras investiga el asesinato de una angustiada futura ex-esposa, y no faltan sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben confiar en un videojuego para obtener su próxima pista sobre dónde atacará un grupo de jóvenes pistoleros.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI tiene dificultades para encontrar al asesino de un infame narcotraficante y Asuntos Internos investiga a un miembro del equipo por drogas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un violador es brutalmente asesinado después de que se expone su identidad. Llaman a Horatio y al equipo de CSI para investigar el asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan a un grupo de artistas de seducción masculinos que buscan conquistas cuando uno de ellos aparece muerto inesperadamente.

programme.desc: When transferring Robert Dunbrook's son from prison to court, the NYPD is ambushed by a group of professional kidnappers.

programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators discovers DNA that contradicts a murder case that was seemingly open and shut before.

programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators resumes their hunt for the Compass Killer after a body falls from the 59th street bridge.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team follows up on a 911 call to a vacant penthouse but finds a nearly 100-Year-Old corpse and a booby-trapped house.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Stella y Danny investigan por qué una mujer joven, hermosa y ciega fue estrangulada en un tejado. ¿Las fiestas de caricias tuvieron algo que ver con eso?

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Es un caos en el zoológico del Bronx. Mac, Danny y la nueva CSI Lindsay Hamilton investigan la muerte de un hombre arrojado a los tigres.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un hombre encontrado muerto a golpes en el festival de San Genaro conduce a Mac y Stella de los callejones de la calle Mott a los poderosos operadores de Wall Street.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mac, Stella y Lindsay descubren por qué arrojaron a una joven bailarina con un billete de lotería ganador en el bolsillo desde el teleférico del puente de Roosevelt Island .

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: La testigo de un brutal asesinato en un ascensor ha desaparecido y, mientras los CSI la siguen, descubren el mundo de las lolitas de Manhattan.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor y el teniente de CSI Miami Horatio Caine siguen la evidencia desde la calurosa Miami a la acerada Nueva York mientras se acercan a Henry Darius.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando un asesinato entra en juego en una partida de póquer de altas apuestas, el equipo de CSI trabaja para descubrir por qué lo que creían que se trataba de la venganza de un tramposo era una identificación errónea.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: En un hospital de muñecas de Nueva York, Mac y Danny recuperan el cadáver del doctor de muñecas bajo cientos de partes de cuerpos –partes de cuerpos de muñecas.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Una estrella en ascenso del roller derby cae muerta en medio de una pelea y Mac y Stella llegan a la pista para investigar la muerte.

programme.desc: Encuentran a un multimillonario muerto en su habitación, cuando Danny comienza a procesar la escena, activa un botón de pánico y queda encerrado con la víctima.

programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de dos modelos en el desfile de moda más popular de la ciudad de Nueva York, donde toda la ropa consiste solo en pintura corporal.

programme.desc: Los CSI investigan una broma que salió mal cuando un surfista del metro se encontró con la destrucción definitiva, pero pronto comprenden que la muerte no fue un accidente.

programme.desc: Stella cree que finalmente tiene una noche libre, pero la anfitriona de una exposición de arte privada a la que asiste es ensartada con un arco y una flecha de alta tecnología.

programme.desc: Stella y Mac examinan un caso en el que un hombre fue asesinado a tiros como resultado de una de las peligrosas guerras de armas de agua de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: As the Mayan kingdom faces its decline, a young man is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression.

programme.title: Santitos
programme.desc: Tras la repentina muerte de su hija, Esperanza se resiste a aceptar el hecho. Con su enorme fe en los milagros hace que se le aparezca San Judas Tadeo y le muestre el camino para encontrar lo que ha perdido.

programme.title: El cuento de las comadrejas
programme.desc: Una actriz de la era dorada del cine argentino comparte una mansión en decadencia con tres hombres: su esposo, un guionista y un director con los que solía trabajar. Pero la llegada de dos jóvenes y la posible venta de la mansión lo cambian todo.

programme.title: Diamantes Negros
programme.desc: Amadou y Moussa son descubiertos en Malí por un ojeador de fútbol, separados de sus familias para convertirse en estrellas del balompié. Emprenden un viaje que les mostrará el mundo de sombras que se esconde tras el deporte rey.

programme.title: Camino a Marte
programme.desc: Fue amor a primera vista entre José y Abril, pero un accidente causa la muerte de José. En el cielo lo tiene todo, excepto a Abril. José convence a su ángel de la guardia de dejarlo volver a Tierra.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Extrañas apariciones
programme.desc: Después de que una familia se ve obligada a mudarse por la salud de su hijo, comienzan a experimentar un comportamiento sobrenatural en su nuevo hogar, que resulta ser una antigua funeraria.

programme.title: Summer Camp (LAS)
programme.desc: En la búsqueda de diversión y nuevas experiencias, cuatro jóvenes se ofrecen como líderes de un campamento. La noche anterior a la llegada de los niños y sin motivo aparente, comienzan a atacarse furiosamente entre ellos.

programme.title: La reliquia
programme.desc: Entren, si se atreven. La gala inaugural de una nueva exhibición en el museo de historia natural de Chicago está por comenzar. Pero tengan cuidado porque algo aterrador quiere asegurarse de que nadie pueda irse.

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer
programme.desc: En este clásico de Tarantino, los bandidos hermanos Gecko ¡cometen una ola de crímenes! Secuestran a un padre y sus dos hijos, y se esconden en un bar mexicano. Pero se enfrentarán a los clientes del bar y se unirán a sus rehenes para sobrevivir.

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: Viernes 13
programme.desc: El campamento Lago Crystal ha estado cerrado durante más de 20 años debido a varios feroces asesinatos sin resolver.

programme.title: De amor y monstruos
programme.desc: En un mundo lleno de monstruos, Joel (Dylan O’Brien) se entera de que su amor de la secundaria (Jessica Henwick) está a 130 kilómetros. Ahora, deberá sacar a su héroe interior y enfrentar peligros desconocidos para estar con la mujer de sus sueños.

programme.title: Beavis y Butt-head, la película

programme.title: South Park: Más grande, más larga y sin censura
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny y Cartman ven una película prohibida para menores que les deforma sus frágiles cabezas. Sus padres no tardan en declarar la guerra a Canadá y los chicos son la última esperanza que tiene Estados Unidos para frenar el Armagedón.

programme.title: Dance Flick
programme.desc: El bailarín callejero Thomas Uncles vive del lado equivocado de las vías, pero gracias a su vínculo con la hermosa Megan White, tal vez el dúo logre cumplir sus sueños al competir en la mayor de todas las batallas de bailarines.

programme.title: Pena ajena
programme.desc: Shaun, un surfer talentoso pero desenfocado, encuentra inspiración en la novela de Martin Skinner y deja Orange County para estudiar Arte Creativo en Stanford.

programme.title: The Perfect Score
programme.desc: Scarlett Johansson, Erika Christensen, Chris Evans y Darius Miles protagonizan esta historia de seis adolescentes que irrumpen en el centro de pruebas y roban las respuestas del S.A.T.

programme.title: Un Ratoncito Duro De Cazar
programme.desc: Los dos hermanos sin suerte Lars y Ernie Smuntz no aprecian la vieja mansión en ruinas que heredaron, hasta que descubren que la propiedad vale millones.

programme.title: El dictador
programme.desc: Los creadores y las estrellas de Borat traen esta asombrosa comedia sobre lo que pasa cuando el peor dictador del mundo llega a los Estados Unidos ¡Prepárate para llorar de risa con esta comedia delirante y bochornosamente divertida!

programme.title: Superhéroes: la película
programme.desc: A un adolescente huérfano le muerde una libélula radioactiva, dándole poderes sobrehumanos en esta parodia de películas como ‘Spider-Man’, ‘X-Men’ y ‘Los cuatro fantásticos’.

programme.title: One Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando’s only time as a Directo, Rio (Marlon Brando) also called "The Kid", his mentor Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), & a third man called Doc, rob a bank of two saddlebags of gold in Sonora, Mexico.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs, and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: One Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando’s only time as a Directo, Rio (Marlon Brando) also called "The Kid", his mentor Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), & a third man called Doc, rob a bank of two saddlebags of gold in Sonora, Mexico.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: The Fortune Cookie
programme.desc: In their very first screen pairing, Walter Matthau (who would win a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his performance) and Jack Lemmon portray a crooked lawyer and his TV cameraman brother-in-law in this madcap tale of greed and recouping lost love.

programme.title: The African Queen

programme.desc: En 1991, la esposa de un militar fue brutalmente asesinada en Filipinas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece sin dejar rastro. A pesar de que se sospecha de un juego sucio, las pistas no funcionan y la investigación se estanca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Marcado de por vida
programme.desc: Un hombre que había cometido delitos, incluido el asesinato, no fue capturado. Casi 50 años después, los avances en la tecnología y el análisis de la escritura descubrieron al criminal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El pensamiento rápido de un investigador lo ayuda a capturar una huella de zapato hecha en la nieve antes de que la evidencia se desvanezca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, la joven madre Tammy Tatum fue encontrada agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su departamento de Longmont, Colorado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 9 años desaparece, la policía y los voluntarios pasan semanas buscándola.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Shannon Melendi, de 19 años, desapareció mientras estaba en la Universidad de Emory. Su desaparición permaneció un misterio durante diez años, hasta que una nueva prueba científica proporcionó una nueva pista sobre Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que aparecen 10 cuerpos en Florida, una víctima – Lisa McVey de 17 años de edad – es secuestrada pero liberada. Ella lleva a la policía al autor del crimen, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, Cassie Hansen, de 6 años, desapareció de su iglesia de Minnesota durante una misa vespertina. Después de recibir un aviso de que se vio a un hombre mayor cargando a una persona pequeña, la policía encontró el cuerpo de Cassie en un basurero.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, de 35 años, fue condenada por el asesinato de David Nixon en Abril del 2002 después de que él había planeado terminar su relación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante siete años, un trío de hombres robó un banco tras otro. Siempre se escapaban antes de que llegara la policía y no dejaban pruebas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Dawn Bruce, de 22 años, es brutalmente asesinada en su apartamento de Virginia. Los investigadores notan una mancha de sangre en la funda de una almohada que parece haber sido hecha por uno de los dedos del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un estudiante de posgrado de la Universidad Estatal de Michigan desapareció y se presumió muerto. Con la ayuda de un profesor de ciencias geológicas, la policía esperaba obtener información de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven pareja decidió celebrar su primer aniversario de bodas con un viaje de campamento a Mount Hood.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Derrick Duehren regresó para encontrar su casa en Oregon hecha cenizas. Los restos calcinados de su esposa se encontraron luego en los escombros. Los investigadores intentaron determinar si fue un accidente desafortunado o un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era querida y exitosa, lo cual hace que la brutalidad del crimen sea más difícil de entender.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se llama a la policía de las Grandes Llanuras por un cadáver, una verificación de antecedentes de la víctima los lleva a una extraña red de vagabundos sin hogar, subastas de ganado y cheques sin fondos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró el cuerpo de una mujer joven y una pequeña fibra en la ropa de la víctima llevó a la policía de San Diego directamente al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un joven bombero murió de lo que parecía ser una enfermedad cardíaca grave pero no diagnosticada, su familia y amigos quedaron devastados, pero no tenían pruebas de algún juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 12 de Mayo de 1994, Crystal Perry fue asesinado viciosamente en su casa en Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, de 32 años, fue encontrado culpable del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que el sospechoso fuera declarado culpable de incendio premeditado y asesinato, mantuvo su inocencia pero fue sentenciado a 25 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1988, se descubrió el cuerpo de una mujer joven en un río de Ohio. La mayor parte de la evidencia había sido borrada, pero el hijo de 6 años de la víctima, sin saberlo, les dijo a los investigadores todo lo que necesitaban saber.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un disparo en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros. ¿Pero fue un homicidio o un suicidio? Se necesitaría la experiencia de expertos forenses y dos juicios con jurado para determinar el destino del asesino acusado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las cámaras de seguridad en un casino rastrearon los movimientos de una joven poco antes de que desapareciera. Nunca se le volvió a ver, pero a través de la evidencia que dejó, pudo decírsele a los investigadores qué le sucedió y quién fue el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El infiel
programme.desc: Walter Notheis, Jr. era mejor conocido al público Americano como el entretenedor, Walter Scott, vocalista principal de la banda, Bob Kuban and the In-Men. Walter no sabía que la canción sería una premonición de los eventos que llevarían a su muerte.

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.desc: Fallon gets a letter from Steven and it turns out he's on an oil rig in the Java Sea, Indonesia. Adam mixes the toxic compound in the paint for Jeff's new office. Fallon hires Kirby as a nanny for little Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff starts to become dizzy and affected by the toxic paint Adam used in his office. Joseph tells Kirby to stay away from Jeff. Krystle goes to Acapulco to find out what really happened with the so-called divorce from Mark.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Carrington family is informed that Steven's oil rig exploded. Blake goes to look for him, with an uninvited Alexis. Sammy Jo's father returns to Denver to collect Sammy Jo's share of Steven's inheritance, but Krystle throws him out.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An obviously ill Jeff continues to function in a confused state. Sammy Jo announces she's headed for New York to make it big as a model and no longer wants to keep her son, Danny. Blake offers the girl $100,000 to be a mother to the child.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff's temper continues to grow more volatile. Adam attempts to implicate Jeff in the Cecil Colby/Logan Rhinewood scandal. After learning that Blake and Krystle intend to adopt Steven's son Danny, Alexis demands custody of her grandson.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Although Blake begs her to postpone taking action until Jeff's violent behavior can be explained. Fallon flies to Haiti to obtain a divorce; Mark shows up unexpectedly at her hotel. Alexis tells Adam she cannot allow Jeff to be poisoned.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.desc: Spring is in the Tian Shan, the 'Mountains of Heaven' in the south of Kazakhstan, in Asia, and two brown bear cubs and their mother have just left their den.

programme.title: The Animal Communicator
programme.desc: What if you could talk to animals and have them talk back to you? Anna Breytenbach has dedicated her life to communication. She sends messages to animals through pictures and thoughts, and receives messages back!

programme.title: The Challenge Of Venice
programme.desc: An inextricable relationship links Venice to her salty, fresh and brackish waters, an inexhaustible resource, yet at the same time, a threat to the city's survival.

programme.title: Stranded
programme.desc: On the 29th May 2009, 55 False Killer Whales swam ashore at Kommetjie beach in Cape Town.This film delves into the events of that fateful day and also examines the worldwide phenomena of why cetaceans beach.

programme.title: Supersonic: The Great Adventure
programme.desc: From Chuck Yeager's successful breaking of the sound barrier in 1947 to high performance supersonic fighter jets, to the recent NASA advances in civilian jet projects, this documentary recounts 70 years of human and technological challenges.

programme.title: Paseka: The Easter Elephant
programme.desc: On Easter morning, a baby elephant is mysteriously abandoned by her herd in the wilds of Botswana's Okavango Delta. Saved from certain death by a bizarre chain of events, she forces herself into a very unusual, captive elephant herd.

programme.title: Portugal's Mountains of Wonder
programme.desc: In Trás-os-Montes, the most remote of Portugal's provinces, lying at the northeastern corner of the country, there lie two relatively small mountains that keep nonetheless a vast and rich natural heritage.

programme.title: Portugal's Southwest: The Coast of the Storks
programme.desc: This is the story of the white storks of southwest Portugal. The only place in the world where these emblematic animals nest on cliffs, in a unique ecosystem where two worlds meet: the Atlantic and the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Iberia's Natural Border
programme.desc: Tagus International is a protected natural space shared between Spain and Portugal. Such is its diversity, it's thought that more animal and plant species live here than in all of many European countries!

programme.title: Ice Dogs
programme.desc: The Arctic is accessible to man only because of ice dogs. As hunters, haulers and guardians, for thousands of years they have been a vital link to nature.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: The deeper the dig, the darker the secrets. As the South African government lifts the moratorium on fracking, the race against time begins to share Jolynn Minaar's findings with the residents of the Karoo -- before it's too late.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Parents of a teenage girl disappear from a highway gas station.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Jess and Brooke investigate the disappearance of a woman from a plane while in flight.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Brooke and Jess search for a woman whose husband was blown up in his car.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Jess and Brooke search for the brother of a dying woman needing a bone marrow donor.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: At the wedding of Eric's best friend, the groom is attack and the bride goes missing, pushing Brooke into the work mode.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: After their mother is arrested, twins Janelle and Tal are sent to live with their Uncle Al in Atlanta, where Janelle learns about the High Water performing arts school in their new neighborhood.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Forced outsider her comfort zone, Janelle struggles at her High Water audition; Tal confronts his bullies.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Tal battles to keep up with his new classmates; Sage makes an unexpected announcement; Davis is faced with a family issue that could derail his future.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Janelle and Dondre can't seem to hide their true feelings; alliances at High Water are challenged.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Sage's troubles start trending; Dondre discovers that Janelle has been keeping a secret from him.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Odalie finds out why Davis has been skipping class; King's loyalties are torn; Tal finally makes a move on his crush.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Lady Mae wants to preach at women's day but Deacon Sykes is not convinced; Basie wants Jacob to run a new community center that will be built near Calvary; Lady Mae confronts Mavis.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Greenleaf family struggles in the aftermath of Mac's release; Lady Mae makes a last-ditch attempt to save the Bishop; Basie's announcement opens a rift between the Bishop and Jacob.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace and Charity oppose Lady Mae's reaction to demands from the Deacon Board; the Bishop visits his father-in-law and runs into Mac; Kerissa and Jacob prepare to move out; Grace goes out with Darius Nash, a journalist following Calvary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police suspect a man who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood are found in the interior. Finally, a tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helps solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Maine resident Pearl Smith goes missing after an argument with her husband, Bill Bruns. When investigators find a blood trail that leads to the couple's basement, police are sure they'll find the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It would take 46 years, handwriting analysis and new fingerprint technology to solve the 1957 murders of two California police officers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1987, un productor de televisión exitoso fue baleado en su oficina de Nueva York. Parecía ser un crimen profesional. Sin pistas, la investigación llegó a un punto muerto.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El robo a un camión blindado en Nueva York en 1981 dejó a un guardia muerto y a otro herido de gravedad. La policía detuvo a unos sospechosos en las cercanías y se produjo otra balacera que costó las vidas de dos oficiales.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre de California fue encontrado descuartizado en 1990, la policía puso sus sospechas en un ladrón local, pero no pudieron encontrarlo. Seis meses más tarde, fue atrapado robando un banco de Arizona y condenado de por vida.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Al principio, cuando David Wilkey fue asesinado de un disparo en la zona rural de Virginia en 1983, pareció un accidente trágico de cacería. Un tenaz investigador de seguros sospechó de una maniobra sucia, pero no tenía pruebas concluyentes.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un cuerpo en llamas en un callejón oscuro arroja luz sobre un asesino. Sus compañeros en el crimen contarían la historia, si hubieran sobrevivido.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los 90, las bandas de drogas aterrorizaron Harlem, los vecindarios de Nueva York.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1994, una inmigrante adolescente fue a los Estados Unidos para cumplir su sueño de convertirse en doctora. Pero un giro trágico del destino intervino cuando se convirtió en una víctima inocente del comercio de las drogas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A mitad de los años 90, una banda de ladrones profesionales de bancos realizó ataques en ciudades a lo largo de siete estados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un fin de semana del Día del Trabajador se convirtió en una pesadilla de homicidios mientras una ola de crímenes tenía aterrorizado a todo el país.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un día que comenzó con un paseo escolar al campo terminó con la peor pesadilla para los padres. Una niña de once años había desaparecido. Sus padres estaban seguros de que no se trataba de una huida.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el verano de 1998, una mujer acaudalada de Jackson, Misisipi, desapareció de su casa a plena luz del día. Solo quedó una misteriosa nota al azar con doce nombres y sin instrucciones específicas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Arizona, un cargamento de dinero desapareció en el desierto junto con los dos hombres contratados para vigilarlo. El FBI no sabía si los guardias eran participantes o víctimas de una emboscada.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El Alabama, un par de criminales condenados escaparon de la custodia de un oficial local y huyeron a lo largo del país. Mientras huían de las autoridades, fueron de estado en estado y desataron una ola de secuestros y robos de autos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1992, una madre joven fue baleada frente a su hijo. La policía buscó respuestas, pero no encontró ninguna. El horrible crimen parecía carente de motivo y sentido, solo por azar.
